Class GameEntity

java.lang.Object
game.entities.GameEntity
All Implemented Interfaces:
Collidable, Renderable, Updatable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Bullet, Player, PowerUp, Trap
public abstract class GameEntity extends Object implements Updatable, Renderable, Collidable
Base type for all in-game entities that have position, size, and active state.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameEntity

      protected GameEntity(double x, double y, double width, double height)
      Creates an entity with the given initial position and size.
      Parameters:
      x - initial x-coordinate
      y - initial y-coordinate
      width - entity width
      height - entity height
